vision: Be the ubiquitous observability platform that empowers every organization to understand, monitor, and act on their data in real-time, enabling teams to build more reliable systems and deliver better user experiences.

values.name: Open Source First
values.description: Core features remain open source; commercial features add enterprise value without limiting community

values.name: Developer Experience
values.description: Make observability accessible and delightful for developers at all skill levels

values.name: Data Agnostic
values.description: Connect to any data source, avoid lock-in, empower users with choice

values.name: Community Driven
values.description: Listen to community feedback, support contributors, and grow the ecosystem

values.name: Reliability at Scale
values.description: Grafana must be as reliable as the systems it monitors

methods.name: Advance Platform Maturity
methods.description: Strengthen core platform capabilities including performance, scalability, and user experience to support enterprise-scale deployments.

methods.name: Enterprise Security & Compliance
methods.description: Achieve enterprise security standards and compliance certifications to unlock regulated industry adoption.

methods.name: World-Class API & Developer Experience
methods.description: Make Grafana the most developer-friendly observability platform with comprehensive APIs, SDKs, and documentation.

methods.name: Quality Excellence
methods.description: Achieve industry-leading quality through comprehensive testing, automation, and continuous improvement.

methods.name: Operations at Scale
methods.description: Enable Grafana to run reliably at any scale with world-class operational capabilities.

obstacles.name: Open Source vs Enterprise Balance
obstacles.description: Maintaining balance between open source features and enterprise monetization
obstacles.mitigation: Clear feature tiers with community-first mindset

obstacles.name: Competition from Cloud Providers
obstacles.description: AWS, GCP, Azure all have native monitoring solutions

obstacles.name: Plugin Ecosystem Quality
obstacles.description: Community plugins vary in quality and maintenance
obstacles.mitigation: Plugin certification program, better SDK tooling

projects.name: Dashboard Performance Optimization
projects.description: Reduce dashboard load times through query optimization and caching

projects.name: Plugin SDK v2
projects.description: Next-generation plugin SDK with better DX and performance

projects.name: SOC 2 Type II Certification
projects.description: Achieve SOC 2 Type II certification for Grafana Cloud

projects.name: Bug Bounty Program Expansion
projects.description: Expand bug bounty scope and improve response times

projects.name: GraphQL API
projects.description: Introduce GraphQL API alongside REST for better client flexibility

projects.name: SDK Refresh
projects.description: Update official SDKs (Go, Python, JS) with modern patterns

projects.name: Test Infrastructure Modernization
projects.description: Modernize test infrastructure for faster, more reliable CI

projects.name: E2E Test Overhaul
projects.description: Migrate to Playwright, improve E2E coverage and reliability

projects.name: High Availability Improvements
projects.description: Improve HA deployment experience and documentation

projects.name: Alerting Engine v2
projects.description: Next-generation alerting with better scalability and features
